executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green, but whole-stack certification remains blocked by marketing owner-loop failing independent verification on stale evidence (2026-05-28) and blocked-channel-recovery escalation (1086 repeats, critical).
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable Codeberg-primary adoption movement.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

live_last_error_details.blocked-channel-recovery: cron: job execution timed out; escalation level=critical, repeat_count=1086

findings.title: Marketing independent verification still fails on stale outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification fails closed because Codeberg-primary adoption movement is still measurement-pending and the artifact is stale (last checked 2026-05-28, age ~5569 min vs 240 min max).
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing; marketing_loop_independent_verification.json is stale with verdict=fail.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery escalated to critical (1086 repeats)
findings.mechanism: Health monitor detects 1086 consecutive repeats for blocked-channel-recovery:timeout, flagged as escalation_level=critical.
findings.root_cause: blocked-channel-recovery cron job timed out (600s limit, last actual duration 326766ms = ~327s) repeatedly across runs. Escalation overdue.
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate blocked-channel-recovery hang (likely network call or infinite loop); repair the timeout/script bug or disable the job.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is coherent and fully enabled
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 24 total, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 error (blocked-channel-recovery: timeout), 3 running (this watchdog + system-health-monitor + codeberg-github-mirror-sync).
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology remains coherent while owner-loop work is in flight.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as the source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity, health-monitor blocker localization, architecture verifier, and shared market-intelligence consumption remain coherent; remaining blockers are correctly externalized.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external (marketing stale fail, blocked-channel-recovery escalation).
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: 7 distinct disabled entries exist in persistence history, but live Gateway topology exposes zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair or disable blocked-channel-recovery (1086-repeat critical escalation)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Escalation level critical means the unblocker domain has been broken for an extended period without resolution.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Eliminates the repeating timeout noise and frees health-monitor bandwidth for real issues.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth instead of persisted-history drift.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reinspected live Gateway cron: 24 total, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 last-error (blocked-channel-recovery: timeout, 1086-repeat critical escalation, conc_errors=1), 3 running (this watchdog + system-health-monitor + codeberg-github-mirror-sync). Persisted disabled entries are history-only.
Direct execution: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Fresh pass confirmed (2026-06-01T16:03+02:00).
Direct execution: ok=true, zero errors. Verifier passed after fresh independent artifact cross-check.
Direct execution: qualified_pass. ZERO architecture errors. Two external blockers: stale marketing independent verification artifact (fail, 2026-05-28) + marketing verdict=fail.
Confirmed code-backed marketing consumers (run.py, reddit_monitor.py, distribution_lane_executor.py) expose machine-verifiable shared market-intelligence consumption.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence; blocked-channel-recovery at critical escalation
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is measurement-pending, and blocked-channel-recovery has 1086 consecutive repeats at critical escalation level.

notes: Architecture green means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
Live inspection: 24 total, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 error (blocked-channel-recovery: timeout), 3 running (system-health-monitor, codeberg-github-mirror-sync, agent-architecture-watchdog).
The remaining blockers are external: marketing outcome evidence (stale fail artifact) and blocked-channel-recovery (critical escalation, 1086 repeats).
All architecture-owned check passes fresh this run: checker=AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, verifier=pass, independent=qualified_pass.
blocked-channel-recovery repeats increased from 1082 to 1086 since last watchdog run. Escalation remains critical.
